commits.subject: Day 108 (09:01): Add retention health advice to state doctor when stale data accumulates (Task 1)

eval.reason: The implementation correctly adds `stale_data_warnings()` called from `handle_doctor()` with the right threshold (5MB), YELLOW formatting, events=0 gating, and appending after the health line. No test was added because no existing doctor test module exists, but the feature logic is sound and `cargo check` passes.
